label: Ambiguous query
response_text:
As of March 11, 2026, the latest stable release of Python is version 3.14.3, which was released on February 3, 2026. ([blog-stage.python.org](https://blog-stage.python.org/2026/02/python-3143-and-31312-are-now-available/?utm_source=openai)) This release includes approximately 299 bug fixes, build improvements, and documentation updates since version 3.14.2.

Some of the major new features introduced in the Python 3.14 series include:

- **PEP 779**: Official support for free-threaded Python, enhancing concurrency capabilities.
- **PEP 649**: Deferred evaluation of annotations, improving the semantics of using annotations.
- **PEP 750**: Introduction of template string literals (t-strings) for custom string processing, utilizing a syntax similar to f-strings.

For more details and to download Python 3.14.3, you can visit the official Python website.
